name: Japan
documentSystem: Two documents: Rirekisho (standardized JIS personal-history form) + Shokumukeirekisho (detailed work history)
notes: The Rirekisho follows a fixed, standardized JIS template with predetermined fields (date of birth, gender, address, affixed photo); it is not a free-form layout. It is normally paired with the Shokumukeirekisho, a separate detailed work-history document. Family name precedes given name.
